strengths: Exceptional technical breadth with 20 years of software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and infrastructure; demonstrates true craftsperson adaptability
Strong track record of technical leadership and execution with multiple Staff/Senior roles, entrepreneurial experience founding GISCollective, and proven ability to teach and mentor
Full-stack builder with demonstrated fluency across code, design, and infrastructure (Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, AWS CDK); recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
concerns: Significant gap in AI/ML expertise: recent role touches AI-agent infrastructure but lacks demonstrated products, platforms, or specialized knowledge in AI strategy, model development, or ML systems
Limited evidence of director-level strategic thinking or influence on company roadmaps; resume emphasizes technical execution rather than strategic impact on organizational direction
No advanced degree in AI/ML (preferred qualification); cloud platform strategy expertise appears limited to operational experience rather than strategic advisory capability
response.justification: Strong technical foundation and leadership credentials, but the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' and this candidate's AI work is recent and appears tactical rather than strategic. The resume shows excellent execution and breadth, but lacks the specialized AI expertise and strategic positioning demanded for a principal-level AI strategy role. Better suited for cloud infrastructure or technical leadership roles outside AI specialization.
